name: Textainer Group Holdings Limited Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 7.000% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preference Shares
summary: Textainer Group Holdings Limited Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 7.000% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preference Shares represents preferred equity in Textainer Group Holdings Limited. These securities offer a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in the event of liquidation. As a depositary share, it represents a fractional interest in a share of preferred stock held by a depositary.
